title: Vanilla Rescaled
description: Vanilla Rescaled is a Minecraft texture pack for people who like the finer details in life.
body:
## Vanilla Rescaled is a resource pack that takes each pixel and upscales it by 4x and adds a little bit of detail. 

I based this pack on [Default Improved](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/default-improved), a pack I used to use all the time but sadly they only updated it to 1.13.2

I plan to keep this updated for as long as I can, so enjoy!
